selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 凯特（女子名, 等于Catherine）
words.definition: n. The brambling finch.

words.translation: n. 男孩
words.definition: n. a friendly informal reference to a grown man

words.translation: n. 女孩, 少女, 女佣
words.definition: n. a young woman

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 船；vi. 乘船
words.definition: n. a small vessel for travel on water

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: n. 驾车, 快车道, 推进力, 驱动, 动力, 击球, 驱动器；vt. 开车, 驱使, 推动, 驾驶
words.definition: n. the act of applying force to propel something

words.translation: n. 小时, 钟头, 时间, ...点钟, 课时
words.definition: n. a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day

words.translation: a. 近的, 近亲的, 近似的；adv. 接近, 亲近
words.definition: a. not far distant in time or space or degree or circumstances

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 护士, 保姆, 奶妈；vt. 看护, 照顾, 培养
words.definition: n. one skilled in caring for young children or the sick (usually under the supervision of a physician)

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: v. 读, 阅读, 理解；a. 有学问的
words.definition: n. something that is read

words.translation: n. 路, 道路, 公路, 途径, 方法
words.definition: n. an open way (generally public) for travel or transportation

words.translation: n. 停止, 车站, 逗留, 填塞, 障碍, (风琴的)音栓；vi. 停止, 被塞住
words.definition: n. the event of something ending

words.translation: n. 太阳, 日, 日光, 阳光；vt. 晒
words.definition: n. the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system

words.translation: n. 等待, 等候；vt. 等候, 期待, 延缓, 伺候, 推迟
words.definition: n. the act of waiting (remaining inactive in one place while expecting something)

words.translation: n. 走, 散步, 步行, 行走的路程, 竞走, 散步场所；vi. 走路, 步行, 处世
words.definition: n. the act of traveling by foot

words.translation: n. 海滩
words.definition: n. an area of sand sloping down to the water of a sea or lake

words.translation: n. 结束, 完结；a. 靠近的, 亲近的, 亲密的, 严密的, 关闭的, 狭窄的, 秘密的
words.definition: v. move so that an opening or passage is obstructed; make shut

words.translation: n. 湿气, 潮湿, 水分, 雨天；a. 湿的, 潮的, 搞错的, 下雨的, 反对禁酒的
words.definition: v. cause to become wet

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: n. abstaining from food

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
words.definition: n. a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: n. that which is below standard or expectations as of ethics or decency

words.translation: n. 汽车, 客车；[机] 车
words.definition: n. a motor vehicle with four wheels; usually propelled by an internal combustion engine

words.translation: n. 变化, 找回的零钱, 找头, 更换；vt. 改变, 更换, 兑换
words.definition: n. an event that occurs when something passes from one state or phase to another

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
words.definition: v. beat for the purpose of cleaning and thickening

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: a. 迟的, 晚的, 已故的；adv. 很晚, 很迟, 晚
words.definition: a. being or occurring at an advanced period of time or after a usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 页, 记录, 事件, 专栏, 男侍；vt. 标明...的页数, 翻...的书页, 分页排版, 呼叫, 侍候
words.definition: n. one side of one leaf (of a book or magazine or newspaper or letter etc.) or the written or pictorial matter it contains

words.translation: n. 经过, 要隘, 途径, 通行, 护照, 及格；vt. 经过, 越过, 通过, 批准, 度过, 传递, 忽略
words.definition: n. (military) a written leave of absence

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: a. 短的, 近的, 矮的, 短期的, 简短的, 少量的；adv. 简短地, 突然

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
words.definition: n. any immature animal

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 草, 草原, 牧场
words.definition: n. narrow-leaved green herbage: grown as lawns; used as pasture for grazing animals; cut and dried as hay

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. food and lodging provided in addition to money

words.translation: a. 新鲜的, 新奇的, 另外的, 淡的, 精神饱满的, 冒失的；adv. 最新地, 刚刚
words.definition: a. recently made, produced, or harvested

words.translation: n. 乐趣, 玩笑, 娱乐；vi. 开玩笑
words.definition: n. activities that are enjoyable or amusing

words.translation: n. 保险箱, 冷藏室；a. 安全的, 可靠的, 平安的, 稳健的, 有把握的
words.definition: n. strongbox where valuables can be safely kept

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: a. 可利用的, 可获得的, 有效的
words.definition: a. obtainable or accessible and ready for use or service

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 休息, 中断, 破裂处, 绝交, 破晓, 突变；vt. 打破, 弄破, 弄坏, 破坏, 违反, 打断, 削弱, 放弃
words.definition: n. an unexpected piece of good luck

words.translation: n. 原因, 目标；vt. 引起, 使产生, 使遭受
words.definition: n. events that provide the generative force that is the origin of something

words.translation: vi. 失败, 缺乏, 中断, 衰退, 失灵；vt. 忘记, 使...失望, 缺乏, 不及格
words.definition: v. fail to do something; leave something undone

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏
words.definition: n. an emotion experienced in anticipation of some specific pain or danger (usually accompanied by a desire to flee or fight)

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 前面, 开头, 前线, 阵线, 态度；vt. 面对, 朝向, 对抗
words.definition: n. the side that is forward or prominent

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的
words.definition: n. an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation

words.translation: n. 会, 集会；a. 适宜的, 合适的

words.translation: n. 过去, 昔时, 往事, 早年经历, 过去时；a. 过去的, 结束的, 卸任的, 过去时的

words.translation: n. 上升, 高地, 增高；vt. 升起, 举起, 唤起, 提高, 使出现, 使复活, 提出, 筹集, 饲养
words.definition: n. the amount a salary is increased

words.translation: a. 真的, 真实的, 实际的, 实在的, 不动(产)的, 实数的；n. 实数, 现实
words.definition: n. the basic unit of money in Brazil; equal to 100 centavos

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 种类, 方式, 品质, 态度, 举止；vt. 分类, 排序, 挑选
words.definition: n. an approximate definition or example

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的

words.translation: a. 宽的, 广阔的, 普遍的, 宽阔的, 广泛的, 一般的；adv. 广阔地, 遍及各处地, 广泛地
words.definition: a. having great (or a certain) extent from one side to the other

words.translation: n. 面包, 生计, 食物；vt. 裹以面包屑

words.translation: v. 攀登, 上升, 爬；n. 攀登, 爬升
words.definition: n. an event that involves rising to a higher point (as in altitude or temperature or intensity etc.)

words.translation: n. 云, 阴暗, 烟雾, 疑团；vt. 以云遮敝, 笼罩, 使黯然
words.definition: n. any collection of particles (e.g., smoke or dust) or gases that is visible

words.translation: a. 高兴的, 喜欢的, 情愿的
words.definition: a. showing or causing joy and pleasure; especially made happy

words.translation: n. 帽子；vt. 给...戴帽子
words.definition: n. headdress that protects the head from bad weather; has shaped crown and usually a brim

words.translation: n. 思想, 愿望, 智力, 记忆, 心理, 情绪, 理智, 主意, 心意；vi. 介意, 注意, 留心
words.definition: n. that which is responsible for one's thoughts and feelings; the seat of the faculty of reason

words.translation: n. 帆, 篷, 帆船, 航程, 帆状物；vi. 航行, 启航, 张帆而行
words.definition: n. a large piece of fabric (usually canvas fabric) by means of which wind is used to propel a sailing vessel

words.translation: num. 五, 五个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of four and one

words.translation: n. 块, 大多数, 质量, 大量, 群众, 弥撒；a. 群众的, 大规模的, 整个的
words.definition: n. the property of a body that causes it to have weight in a gravitational field

words.translation: num. 六, 六个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of five and one

words.translation: n. 荒野, 荒地；a. 野性的, 野蛮的, 野生的, 失控的, 任性的, 杂乱的, 轻率的, 狂热的, 疯狂的

words.translation: n. 袋子, 袋状物；vt. 使膨大, 装袋, 猎获

words.translation: n. 木板, 甲板, 膳食, 会议桌；vt. 乘船, 供膳食, 用板覆盖

words.translation: n. 捕捉, 陷阱, 捕捉之物, 抓, 拉手；vt. 捕捉, 赶上, 感染, 听清楚

words.translation: n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职
words.definition: n. a seat for one person, with a support for the back

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地
words.definition: n. the central and most intense or profound part

words.translation: n. 怀疑, 疑惑；v. 怀疑, 不信
words.definition: n. the state of being unsure of something

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的

words.translation: n. 风扇, 迷, 狂热者, 爱好者；vt. 煽动, 刺激, 吹拂
words.definition: n. a device for creating a current of air by movement of a surface or surfaces

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 饲料, 一餐, 饲养；vt. 喂, 饲养, 放牧, 靠...为生
words.definition: n. food for domestic livestock

words.translation: n. 伤害, 创伤, 损害；v. 伤害, (使)伤心, 危害, 刺痛
words.definition: v. give trouble or pain to

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: n. a city in southeastern France on the Mediterranean; the leading resort on the French Riviera

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
words.definition: n. a brief written record

words.translation: n. 一双, 一对, 一副；v. (使)成对
words.definition: n. a set of two similar things considered as a unit

words.translation: n. 块, 片, 篇, 碎片, 部分, 部件, 标准量；vt. 修补, 修理, 拼合, 接线头
words.definition: n. a separate part of a whole

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 岩石, 岩礁, 石头, 基石, 暗礁, 摇动, 摇滚乐；vt. 摇摆, 摇动, 使摇晃, 使动摇

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂

words.translation: n. 速率, 速度, 迅速；vi. 加速, 超速, 快进
words.definition: n. distance travelled per unit time
